title: EnchantedApple
description: Allows to craft enchanted golden apples
body:
# EnchantedApple
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins
- Allows to craft enchanted golden apple by following the recipe from previous mc versions. 
- The purpose of this plugin is to improve pvp experience. 
- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
